title: View logs for a registered collector

blocks.content: In this milestone, you view internal logs for a registered collector. Fleet Management automatically creates and assigns `self_monitoring_logs_*` configuration pipelines based on the collector's operating system or platform.
To view logs for a registered collector, complete the following steps:
Search, filter, or sort to find the collector in your **Inventory**.
Click the collector to open the details view.
Use the search box to look for specific log lines or error messages.
Use **Explore Logs** to investigate the collector logs in Explore Logs.

Error-level logs can help you diagnose remote configuration failures, cache read or load failures, and cache write failures. Debug-level logs can help you identify when the collector requests, skips, or reloads remote configuration.

After you finish this milestone, you have completed the journey.

---

### Troubleshooting

Explore the following troubleshooting topics if you need help:

- [Logs don't appear in app](/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/fleet-management/set-up/onboard-collectors/onboard-troubleshooting/#logs-dont-appear-in-app)
